---
name: markdown-memory-curator
description: Use at the end of every marketing run to update persistent Markdown memory.
---
# Markdown Memory Curator

## Process

1. Read all artifacts created in this run.
2. Identify durable facts, buyer language, tactic outcomes, and experiment learnings.
3. Update only relevant memory files.
4. Add date, source/campaign, confidence, and follow-up.

## Output

```markdown
# Memory Update Summary

## Files updated
## Facts added
## Buyer language added
## Tactic learnings added
## Experiment learnings added
## Follow-up
```
